citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: A tree is a collection of labeled nodes, each of which (save the root) has a link to a parent node above it in the hierarchy. Childless nodes are called leaves or terminal nodes; those with children are non-terminal nodes.
